ddls:
CREATE TABLE "land_parcels" (
  "parcel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each land parcel */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the land parcel in square units */,
  "perimeter" REAL /* Perimeter of the land parcel in linear units */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the land parcel or its features */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the land parcel or its features */,
  "label" INTEGER /* Label categorizing the land parcel for identification */,
  "location" TEXT /* GPS coordinates or spatial data for precise location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parcel was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parcel was last updated */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the owners table for tracking parcel ownership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parcel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_land_parcels_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_land_parcels_label FOREIGN KEY ("label") REFERENCES labels ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label used for categorization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the label's significance or usage */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the label (e.g., zoning, land type) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., Area, Perimeter) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., square meters, meters) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the measurement type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "parcel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the land parcel being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the parcel data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the parcel data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string to identify the device/browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_parcel_id FOREIGN KEY ("parcel_id") REFERENCES land_parcels ("parcel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parcel_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "parcel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the land parcel associated with the metadata */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key representing the metadata entry */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value associated with the metadata entry */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., text, number) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parcel_metadata_parcel_id FOREIGN KEY ("parcel_id") REFERENCES land_parcels ("parcel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact details of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)
